title: besleria fluminensis
intro: Besleria fluminensis, also known as the "Amazonian Besleria," is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical regions of South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Besleria fluminensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and colds. The herbal preparation of Besleria fluminensis typically involves making a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
